raw:
## Completed
Implemented the Foreman route-through-foreman guard with crew/subagent exemptions, direct-mode escape hatch, and classifier tests.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/guard.ts` - new pure `classifyToolCall()` guard classifier.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - registers `tool_call` guard, `/foreman-direct`, and `FOREMAN_CREW=1` for Foreman crew subprocesses.
- `extensions/subagent/index.ts` - passes `FOREMAN_CREW=1` into spawned subagents.
- `extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh` - new hermetic guard classifier tests.

## How To Verify
`cd /Users/a1241968/Desktop/Oscar/my-pi-harness && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh`

## Notes
Also smoke-tested extension loading, crew env bypass, direct-mode bypass, and `gate_flow_test.sh`.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)
